name: toby-plugins
description: Toby's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: toby-multi-agent
plugins.description: Multi-agent workspace — delegate to Codex/Gemini in background, or run a persistent team in cmux panes alongside Claude. Includes cmux terminal control and TDD team.

plugins.name: toby-session
plugins.description: Session lifecycle — handoff before ending, verify-and-resume on the next session, log conversations. Includes opt-in pre-commit conversation-log hook.

plugins.name: toby-claude-config
plugins.description: Manage your ~/.claude config — backup/restore CLAUDE.md, settings, user commands/skills/subagents, installed plugins. Includes a permissions-merge command and a recursive-rm guard hook.

plugins.name: toby-codereview
plugins.description: Parallel-agent code analysis — /code-quality, /code-explore, and prd skill. Built around the 'fan out → markdown report' pattern.

plugins.name: toby-personal
plugins.description: Toby's personal domain skills — Facebook-style writing voice, OMC quick-reference, harness use-case launcher, Spring Boot init / Boot 4 migration guide. Highly opinionated.
